result.status_detail: FAIL_AUTH: wrtn.ai logged out (header shows 로그인/무료로 회원가입, no user avatar). Auth gate before chat — matches W4+W6 baseline outcome class.

notes: W5.1 regression check, legacy WS builder. Baseline was FAIL_AUTH (logged out) — confirmed unchanged. wrtn remains on legacy WS builder; copilot dispatch refactor (DB-driven emit_ws_envelope) did NOT alter wrtn outcome. After hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), DOM auth check showed login/signup links in top-right header and no logged-in avatar => 로그인 gate. Prompt not submitted (auth gate reached first), consistent with W4+W6 baseline. No new regression introduced by W5.1.
